core_mechanism: a self-consistent fixed-point that aggregates many agents' private local inferences into a single shared summary statistic on which each agent in turn conditions, with the governing question being whether that aggregate is an information-sufficient statistic for the hidden state (a rational-expectations / mean-field self-consistency loop of coupled decentralized estimators)
brief_reason: The abstract centers on a price statistic formed from dispersed private information that agents condition on in equilibrium, and its main result is that this aggregate fails, even approximately, to convey the information the agents individually extracted.
